## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 580 articles live by Saturday; publishing workflow issues resolved](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Traffic metrics improving: 480 sessions last week, views increasing; older content clusters compounding well](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Editorial strategy shift: Moving towards deeper, product-tied content for higher-quality traffic](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Social media content improving: Team better at capturing essence, but writing style needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [580 articles live by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Publishing workflow issues fixed, back to normal next week](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Traffic metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [480 sessions last week (new high)](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Views increasing in lockstep](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Older content clusters (AI agents, construction, sales, productivity) compounding well](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
      - [Newer clusters (e.g., agents for marketing) showing volatility](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Strong presence in top 10 Google results (83 keywords in positions 4-10)](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Lower presence in top 3 positions, aiming to improve](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [18% of overall sessions from referral traffic (benchmark \~10%)](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [ChatGPT is the highest referral source](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Editorial Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from experimental approach to more focused, deep-dive content](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Plan to create programmatic pages (industry, use case, product) for top-line traffic](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Blog to become hub for high-quality, conversion-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Aiming to tie product more closely to individual use cases](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Website Performance

  - [Overall website traffic plateauing](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Blog traffic now accounts for over 50% of website traffic](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Need for website refresh to improve return visitor rates and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Social Media Content

  - [Improvement in capturing essence of discussions](https://fathom.video/share/crxaNs3jDugsVYZjkZss6sYT6gzWLt1y?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Content Creation Process
